document_metadata.description: A low-fidelity wireframe document for the PawMarket pet shop e-commerce and service management platform

screens.description: Landing page with featured products and services

featured_products.interaction: Click card to go to Product Detail

customer_reviews.content: Star rating + quote lines + reviewer avatar

screens.description: Authentication page with tab-based form switching

tab_1.name: Login
tab_1.validation: Validates email + password; shows error state if wrong

tab_2.name: Register
tab_2.agreement: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
tab_2.validation: Validates all fields; sends verification email on success

screens.description: User account overview with orders, appointments, and profile info

profile_section.title: Profile Update Form
profile_section.note: Saves to user profile; success toast shown on update

options.description: Get a code sent to your phone
Get a code sent to your email

screens.description: Customer support center with FAQs and contact options

faqs.question: How long does standard shipping take?
Can I change my shipping address after ordering?
How do I track my order?
What happens if my order is lost in transit?
How do I book a grooming appointment?
What should I bring to the grooming session?
How do I initiate a return?
When will I receive my refund?
Is it safe to save my card information?

screens.description: Product browsing with filters and search capabilities

search_bar.feature: Live search with instant result filtering

filter_groups.name: Price Range
filter_groups.feature: Drag slider to set price range

screens.description: Detailed product information with purchase options

components.breadcrumb: Home › Products › Dog Food › Royal Canin Adult Premium

main_image.label: Product Main Image
main_image.interaction: Zoom on hover; lightbox on click

thumbnail_strip.description: Thumbnail strip — click to swap main image

pricing.note: Dynamic price from backend; sale badge conditional

buttons.label: Add to Cart
buttons.note: Cart update triggers cart count in nav

cart_items.title: Cart Items (3)
cart_items.items_layout: Items with qty +/- controls; remove/save-for-later links

promo_code.title: Promo / Coupon Code
promo_code.note: Validates against DB; shows discount on success

screens.description: Multi-step booking flow for grooming services

step_1.title: Step 1 — Select Grooming Service
step_1.note: Single-select service card; shows price + duration

calendar.title: ← March 2026 →
calendar.feature: Calendar — past dates + unavailable dates greyed out; selected date highlighted

fields.label: Select Pet
fields.placeholder_new: Or fill in new pet details below

primary_button.label: Confirm Appointment & Pay
primary_button.note: Payment via saved card or new card; confirmation email sent

screens.description: Administrative control panel for business management

alerts.message: 3 products are out of stock — Immediate restock required
12 orders are pending shipment for more than 48 hours

inventory_management.title: Inventory Management — Quick Access
inventory_management.search: Search inventory by name, SKU, category...
inventory_management.note: Low stock items flagged in red column; inline edit; status badge changes color on stock level; restock triggers purchase order

revenue_chart.title: Revenue Chart (Last 12 Months)
revenue_chart.description: Hover to see exact revenue value

user_roles.description: Standard user with shopping and service booking capabilities
Administrator with full business management access
